title: Resolve rust/cleartext-logging alerts #28-#35
description: Reduce or clean sensitive output in CLI and Snyk sync paths where practical; dismiss only true false positives with explicit rationale.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started. Rust cleartext-logging findings are being triaged: code changes applied to stdout/stderr emission paths; remaining Snyk-sync findings are likely false positives tied to non-secret issue IDs persisted in issue files.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed. Applied output-emission hardening in cli/rich_text_signals and dismissed remaining rust cleartext-logging alerts as false positives (public issue IDs, no secrets). Dismissed alerts: #38, #39, #40.
